mapper.sql: id, api_id, vehicle_no, info_content, warn_type_time, warn_type, info_id, data_type, info_length, data_length, vehicle_color, warn_src, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
insert into car_alarm (id, api_id, vehicle_no, info_content, warn_type_time, warn_type, info_id, data_type, info_length, data_length, vehicle_color, warn_src, create_time, update_time ) values
( #{item.id}, #{item.apiId}, #{item.vehicleNo}, #{item.infoContent}, #{item.warnTypeTime}, #{item.warnType}, #{item.infoId}, #{item.dataType}, #{item.infoLength}, #{item.dataLength}, #{item.vehicleColor}, #{item.warnSrc}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
on duplicate key update info_content = values(info_content), warn_type_time = values(warn_type_time), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = sysdate()
